name: Allegion plc
summary: PART I Overview Allegion plc ("Allegion," "we," "us" or "the Company") is a leading global provider of security products and solutions that keep people and assets safe and secure in the places they live, learn, work and connect. We pioneer safety and security to create a safer and more accessible world.
